title: Multi-Model Agent Benchmark
description: Build a POC comparing agentic task completion rates across Claude Opus 4.6, GPT-4, and open-source models. Test coding, tool use, and multi-step reasoning tasks.

title: Self-Funded Health Plan Cost Simulator
description: Interactive calculator comparing fully-insured vs self-funded + stop loss costs for employers with 100-5000 employees. Factor in specific and aggregate deductibles, expected claims, and carrier pricing.

title: Automated SRE Dashboard
description: Consolidate Scout's daily system health checks into a live dashboard. Track disk, memory, load, port exposure, and agent health over time with trend lines.

title: AI-Powered Security Audit Reporter
description: Combine Sentinel's security scans with Scout's system checks into a unified security posture report. Flag regressions automatically.

title: Stop Loss Claims Severity Tracker
description: Track and visualize large claim trends (gene therapy, GLP-1, transplants) that drive stop loss pricing. Use public data sources to model impact on attachment points.

title: React Component Library for Agent UIs
description: Build a shared React component library for all agent-facing dashboards. Cards, tables, status badges, and charts — minimal and consistent design system.
